title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Wipro - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Wipro - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wipro has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wipro:
Wipro is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro!
